seoTitle: Coffee Camp vs Coffs Harbour — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coffee Camp and Coffs Harbour. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Coffee Camp vs Coffs Harbour: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coffee Camp and Coffs Harbour.
heading: Coffee Camp vs Coffs Harbour — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coffee Camp, New South Wales and Coffs Harbour, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coffee Camp has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Coffs Harbour (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coffee Camp or Coffs Harbour safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coffee Camp has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Coffs Harbour scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coffee Camp scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Coffs Harbour scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coffee Camp or Coffs Harbour?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coffee Camp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
